productDisplayName: Puma Women Future Cat Remix White Blue Shoe
description: Designed to be worn outside the racetrack, these black sneakers from puma's ferrari range embody all the excitement and energy of the race. The Scudera Ferrari pair comes with the iconic badge and great motor sport styling. The outsoles with horizontal grips make these shoes ultra comfortable and durable while providing excellent grip, making it a perfect urban wear.Upper Features a low-profile design made for the avid motor-Sports enthusiast Premium leather upper for longer wear Bold, contrasting formstripe logo outlining Asymmetrical lacing system alleviates pressure points Textile lining with cushioned footbed for enhanced comfort Rubber outsole embedded onto the heel counter for shock absorption Midsole Cushioned midsole for comfort and stability Scuderia Ferrari logo shield Outsole Durable rubber outsole for enhanced traction
